query:
SELECT 
  s.id, s.chaveJ, s.nome,
  s.pctConsig, s.pctConsorcio, s.pctCc, s.pctOurocap, s.pctSeguro, s.pctDental,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmCreditoC2), 0) as rbmConsig,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmConsorcioC2), 0) as rbmConsorcio,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmContaCorrente), 0) as rbmCc,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmOurocap), 0) as rbmOurocap,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmSeguros), 0) as rbmSeguros,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmCreditoC2), 0) * s.pctConsig / 100, 2) as comissaoConsig,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmConsorcioC2), 0) * s.pctConsorcio / 100, 2) as comissaoConsorcio,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmContaCorrente), 0) * s.pctCc / 100, 2) as comissaoCc
FROM supervisores s
LEFT JOIN agentes a ON UPPER(a.supervisor) = UPPER(s.nome)
LEFT JOIN calculos c ON c.chaveJ = a.chaveJ AND c.mesRef = '04/2026'
GROUP BY s.id, s.chaveJ, s.nome, s.pctConsig, s.pctConsorcio, s.pctCc, s.pctOurocap, s.pctSeguro, s.pctDental;

SELECT 
  s.id, s.chaveJ, s.nome,
  s.pctConsig, s.pctConsorcio, s.pctCc, s.pctOurocap, s.pctSeguro, s.pctDental,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmCreditoC2), 0) as rbmConsig,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmConsorcioC2), 0) as rbmConsorcio,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmContaCorrente), 0) as rbmCc,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmOurocap), 0) as rbmOurocap,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmSeguros), 0) as rbmSeguros,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmCreditoC2), 0) * s.pctConsig / 100, 2) as comissaoConsig,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmConsorcioC2), 0) * s.pctConsorcio / 100, 2) as comissaoConsorcio,
  ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(c.rbmContaCorrente), 0) * s.pctCc / 100, 2) as comissaoCc
FROM supervisores s
LEFT JOIN agentes a ON UPPER(a.supervisor) = UPPER(s.nome)
LEFT JOIN calculos c ON c.chaveJ = a.chaveJ AND c.mesRef = '04/2026'
GROUP BY s.id, s.chaveJ, s.nome, s.pctConsig, s.pctConsorcio, s.pctCc, s.pctOurocap, s.pctSeguro, s.pctDental;
